title: Limitation on number of municipal attorneys
doc_html:
SUBPART B.  PARTICULAR OFFICERS

§1811.  Limitation on number of municipal attorneys

Except where otherwise specially provided, a municipality shall have no more than one municipal attorney and no more than three assistant municipal attorneys.
doc_text:
SUBPART B.  PARTICULAR OFFICERS
§1811.  Limitation on number of municipal attorneys
Except where otherwise specially provided, a municipality shall have no more than one municipal attorney and no more than three assistant municipal attorneys.
